# terrible_community_general_scaleway_container_registry (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the container registry.
- `project_id` (String) Project identifier.
- `region` (String) Scaleway region to use (for example `fr-par`).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the container registry.
- `privacy_policy` (String) Default visibility policy. Everyone can pull images from a `public` registry.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the container registry.

### Read-Only

- `container_registry` (String) The container registry information.
